signals.signal: Dan (RightRev) flagged that the MEDDPICC workshop series is stalling — sales team not completing pre-work before sessions; asks whether Akash can add a pre-work checkpoint.

Doug (VP Sales, Delightree) responded to Akash's hiring follow-up: Will Frank's team will do first-round vetting; dedicated scheduling window confirmed for this week; EA support still pending from Tushar.
Billy posted updated operating plan to #p-sewerai; Q1 miss narrative framed as PAYG-to-direct trade-off. Akash has not yet confirmed the narrative is investor-ready.
Roi (Auditoria CEO) posted that the Cole Group CMO shortlist is down to 2 candidates; interviews scheduled for this week.
Brady (CloudZero) shared that Q1 ARR came in at 102% of plan. Justin Moore (Innovius, new CloudZero CEO) acknowledged in thread.
Alex (ClearML) confirmed Moses responded to Akash — Scott Tecton advisor call scheduled for Thursday 3/26.
Justin Moore (Innovius) posted that he is fully transitioned into the CloudZero CEO role as of today; asks Innovius team to update any external-facing materials that reference his previous role.
